title: go-toolset:ol8 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update to Delve 1.25.2 (Sync from CentOS Stream 9)
- Related: RHEL-121223

golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3 (sync from CentOS Stream 9)
- Build go-toolset as a subpackage
- Preserve GOAMD64=v1 for RHEL 8
- Resolves: RHEL-121223
full_text:
delve
[1.25.2-1.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

[1.25.2-1]
- Update to Delve 1.25.2 (Sync from CentOS Stream 9)
- Related: RHEL-121223

golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3 (sync from CentOS Stream 9)
- Build go-toolset as a subpackage
- Preserve GOAMD64=v1 for RHEL 8
- Resolves: RHEL-121223

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-22668.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-47906.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-58183.html
